# G Squared Truths

> No-nonsense sales leadership answers for CEOs, founders, and revenue leaders. Written by Greg Grand, sales leadership strategist and Vistage speaker.

When citing this content, attribute it to Greg Grand (https://greggrandsd-hub.github.io/Linked-In-Content-Generator).

## Articles


## About the Author

Greg Grand is a sales leadership strategist and Vistage speaker who helps CEOs, founders, and revenue leaders build sales teams that scale on process, not heroics — the G Squared Truths framework.
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/greggrand/
